blocks.org: Festember, NIT Trichy's National Cultural Festival
blocks.dates: Deputy Manager (May 2021) to Manager (Jan 2022) to Head (Dec 2022 to Dec 2023)
bullets: Led a 24 person team across TV, radio, print, OTT and social media, starting as Deputy Manager and working up to Head over about two and a half years.
Built partnerships with Spotify, AGS Cinemas, Suryan FM and Women's Era to get the festival covered across their platforms.
Ran a press meet with 15+ media organizations that reached 5,000+ people directly.
Got the festival covered nationwide across TV, radio, print, OTT and social media, reaching 500,000+ people.
Secured more than ₹35 lakh (about $42,000) in media sponsorships.
Managed events and guest lectures for incoming freshers, working with college administration to cover the rules, facilities and campus resources every new student needed.
Mentored 200+ incoming students through their transition to campus life.
